title: Independent left/right panels
rationale: Users can have LayerPanel + SidePanel open simultaneously for cross-reference. Rules out mutually exclusive panel toggling.

title: No silent mode cancellation on panel change
rationale: Removed handleSectionChange hook - panel layout is orthogonal to interaction modes. Eliminates hidden coupling that caused measurements disappearing when switching panels.

title: Query params over hash fragments for UI state
rationale: Hash reserved for future viewport state (#zoom/lat/lng), query params are standard for UI state. Rules out route-per-view and hash-based state.

title: Unified activeDialog replaces boolean set
rationale: Single source of truth for dialogs eliminates useDialogVisibility helper. Rules out per-dialog boolean state.

title: EditorLayout as separate class not merged into MapEditorState
rationale: Panel layout is UI chrome, not editor interaction state - different lifecycle and concerns. Rules out merging panel state into MapEditorState.
